docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY FOX,PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDFIELD,E.RONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO RONNIE GOLDFIELD RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOX,PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDFIELD,E.RONNIE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDFIELD,E.RONNIE HEARING SET FOR SEP-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-29-1993, GRANTED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOX,PAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDFIELD,E.RONNIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
